name: @pyaserv/site
description: PyaServ — services classifieds for Paraguay. Astro static, deployed to GitHub Pages, custom domain pyaserv.com.

scripts.build: bun run i18n:build && astro build && bun scripts/rewrite-locale-head.ts
scripts.test: bun run i18n:build && bun test src/
scripts.test:perf: bun tests/perf/lighthouse.ts && bun tests/perf/ssr-payload.ts && bun tests/perf/no-mutations.ts
